swahili.estimate_the_r_for_this_scatter_plot: Kadiria R² kwa mchoro huu wa mtawanyiko
swahili.scatter_for_relationships_line_for_tim: Mtawanyiko kwa mahusiano, mstari kwa wakati, pau kwa kategoria, histogramu kwa umbo la usambazaji, mchoro wa kisanduku kwa kutawanyika + vipekee, mkunjo wa lukuki kwa lukuki. Kuchagua aina mbaya ya chati kwa kawaida kunapotosha zaidi kuliko kuelimisha.
swahili.mean_vs_median_median_wins_for_skewed_: Wastani vs midiani (midiani hushinda kwa data iliyopinda), mkengeuko wa kawaida vs IQR (IQR hushinda kwa data isiyo ya kawaida), uhusiano vs usababishi (uhusiano mdogo HAUTHIBITISHI kutokuwepo kwa kiungo cha kisababishi).
swahili.ap_stats_data_literacy_items_each_ques: Vipengele vya AP Stats / ujuzi wa data. Kila swali huunganishwa tena na seti ya data inayotumika ili uweze kuthibitisha kwa macho kabla ya kujibu.
swahili.paste_from_google_sheets_generate_samp: Bandika kutoka Google Sheets, tengeneza data ya sampuli, hamisha kama PNG/CSV. Wanafunzi wengi hudharau ni kiasi gani cha uchambuzi halisi wa data ni USAFISHAJI wa data (~70% ya muda wote).
swahili.set_a_true_population_r_then_watch_how: Weka r halisi ya idadi ya watu, kisha tazama jinsi ukubwa wa sampuli, kelele, na vipekee vinavyopotosha r iliyozingatiwa. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo — unda dhana na uchunguze.
swahili.x_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Kuratibu X kwa nukta mpya ya data
swahili.y_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Kuratibu Y kwa nukta mpya ya data
swahili.sample_size_interpret_r_with_n_in_mind: Ukubwa wa sampuli — fasiri R² ukizingatia n
swahili.add_data_points_to_see_statistics: Ongeza nukta za data ili kuona takwimu
swahili.need_variation_in_y_values: Tofauti inahitajika katika thamani za Y
swahili.y_value_for_z_score_calculation: Thamani ya Y kwa hesabu ya alama ya Z
swahili.select_a_quiz_type_and_click_start_qui: Chagua aina ya jaribio na ubonyeze "Anza Jaribio"!
swahili.z_score_transform_y: Badilisha Y kuwa alama ya Z
swahili.sort_points_by_x_value: Panga nukta kwa thamani ya X
swahili.swap_x_and_y_values: Badilishana thamani za X na Y
swahili.transformations_modify_data_in_place_u: 💡 Mabadiliko hurekebisha data papo hapo. Tumia Tendua (↩) kurejesha.
swahili.generate_20_points_with_a_target_corre: Zalisha nukta 20 zenye nguvu ya uhusiano lengwa:
swahili.watch_how_statistics_change_as_each_po: Tazama jinsi takwimu zinavyobadilika kila nukta inapofunuliwa moja baada ya nyingine.
swahili.observed_r_matches_the_true_population: r iliyozingatiwa inalingana na r halisi ya idadi ndani ya 0.05.
swahili.observed_r_is_off_by_0_05_0_15_expecte: r iliyozingatiwa inapotoka kwa 0.05-0.15. Inatarajiwa kwa n ndogo au kelele wastani.
swahili.observed_r_differs_by_0_15_0_30_a_real: r iliyozingatiwa inatofautiana kwa 0.15-0.30. Athari halisi inaweza kuonekana dhaifu (au kinyume chake).
swahili.observed_r_is_wildly_off_0_30_outliers: r iliyozingatiwa imepotoka sana (>0.30). Vipekee au n ndogo sana vinaweza kugeuza kabisa mwelekeo unaoonekana.
swahili.correlation_inquiry_when_samples_misle: 🔬 Uchunguzi wa uhusiano - Wakati sampuli zinapotosha
swahili.set_true_population_r_sample_size_nois: Weka r halisi ya idadi, ukubwa wa sampuli, kelele, vipekee. Tabiri ni kiasi gani r iliyozingatiwa inapotoka. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo.
swahili.your_hypothesis_which_single_change_mo: Dhana yako (ni mabadiliko gani moja yanayopotosha zaidi r iliyozingatiwa?)
swahili.e_g_2_outliers_at_n_20_do_more_damage_: mf., vipekee 2 kwa n=20 husababisha uharibifu zaidi kuliko vipekee 10 kwa n=200...
swahili.can_outliers_flip_the_sign_of_r_try_tr: Je, vipekee vinaweza kugeuza alama ya r? Jaribu r halisi=+0.7 na vipekee 3.
swahili.how_does_increasing_n_reduce_the_noisy: Je, kuongeza n hupunguzaje hali ya kadirio lenye kelele?
swahili.when_does_noise_sd_swamp_the_true_sign: Ni lini SD ya kelele inazama kabisa ishara halisi - r inaonekanaje wakati huo?
swahili.why_is_r_alone_never_enough_to_publish: Kwa nini r peke yake haitoshi kamwe kuchapisha? Ni nini kingine kinachopaswa kuiandama (CI, mtawanyiko, ukaguzi wa uimara)?
swahili.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Naweza kueleza kwa nini mchanganyiko huu wa n, kelele, na vipekee unazalisha tofauti hii.
swahili.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Wijeti ya uchunguzi - hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo, hakuna kumwaga majibu. Data ya sanisi hutumia mbegu ya kibainifu kutoka kwa vitelezi, hivyo nafasi ileile ya kitelezi daima huzalisha uchotaji uleule. Tafiti halisi huona uchotaji mmoja na lazima zifikirie kuhusu kutokuwa na uhakika.

somali.scatter_for_relationships_line_for_tim: Firidhsanaan xidhiidhka, xariiq waqtiga, baar qaybaha, histogram qaabka qaybinta, sanduuq jaantus firdhinta + qiimaha shisheeye, qalooca isuruurinta isuruurinta. Doorashada nooca khaldan ee jaantuska badanaa way marin habaabisaa wax ka badan inay wargeliso.
somali.mean_vs_median_median_wins_for_skewed_: Celcelis vs dhexe (dhexe ayaa ku guulaysata xog leexan), leexashada caadiga ah vs IQR (IQR ayaa ku guulaysata xog aan caadi ahayn), xiriir vs sababin (xiriir hooseeya MA caddaynayo maqnaanshaha xidhiidh sababeed).
somali.ap_stats_data_literacy_items_each_ques: Walxaha AP Stats / aqoonta xogta. Su'aal kasta waxay ku xidhan tahay xog-ururinta firfircoon si aad u xaqiijiso aragti ahaan ka hor inta aanad jawaabin.
somali.paste_from_google_sheets_generate_samp: Ka dhaji Google Sheets, samee xog muunad ah, dhoofi sida PNG/CSV. Ardayda intooda badan way dhayalsadaan inta falanqaynta xogta dhabta ah ay tahay NADIIFINTA xogta (~70% wadarta wakhtiga).
somali.inquiry_when_samples_mislead: Baadhitaan — marka muunadaha ay marin habaabiyaan
somali.set_a_true_population_r_then_watch_how: Deji r dhab ah oo dadweynaha, ka dibna fiiri sida cabbirka muunadda, buuqa, iyo qiimaha shisheeye ay u qalloociyaan r la arkay. Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto — samee mala-awaal oo sahami.
somali.x_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Iskuduwaha X ee dhibic xog cusub
somali.y_coordinate_for_new_data_point: Iskuduwaha Y ee dhibic xog cusub
somali.sample_size_interpret_r_with_n_in_mind: Cabbirka muunadda — fasir R² adoo tixgelinaya n
somali.no_saved_charts_yet: Weli ma jiraan jaantusyo la kaydiyay
somali.add_data_points_to_see_statistics: Ku dar dhibcaha xogta si aad u aragto tirakoobka
somali.need_variation_in_y_values: Waxaa loo baahan yahay kala duwanaansho qiimaha Y
somali.y_value_for_z_score_calculation: Qiimaha Y ee xisaabinta dhibcaha Z
somali.select_a_quiz_type_and_click_start_qui: Dooro nooca imtixaanka oo guji "Bilow Imtixaanka"!
somali.need_2_points_to_predict: Waxaa loo baahan yahay 2+ dhibic si loo saadaaliyo
somali.add_data_points_first: Marka hore ku dar dhibcaha xogta
somali.z_score_transform_y: Beddel Y una rog dhibcaha Z
somali.random_noise_20_stddev: Buuq aan kala sooc lahayn ±20% leexashada caadiga
somali.swap_x_and_y_values: Is weydaarsii qiimaha X iyo Y
somali.transformations_modify_data_in_place_u: 💡 Beddelaaduhu xogta meesheeda ayay wax ka beddelaan. Isticmaal Ka noqo (↩) si aad u soo celiso.
somali.random_data_generator: 🎲 Soo saaraha xogta aan kala sooc lahayn
somali.generate_20_points_with_a_target_corre: Soo saar 20 dhibic oo leh xoogga xiriirka bartilmaameedka:
somali.watch_how_statistics_change_as_each_po: Daawo sida tirakoobku u beddelmo marka dhibic kasta la muujiyo mid mid.
somali.observed_r_matches_the_true_population: r la arkay wuxuu la mid yahay r dhabta ah ee dadweynaha gudaha 0.05.
somali.observed_r_is_off_by_0_05_0_15_expecte: r la arkay wuxuu ka leexday 0.05-0.15. Waa la filayaa n yar ama buuq dhexdhexaad ah.
somali.observed_r_differs_by_0_15_0_30_a_real: r la arkay wuu ku kala duwan yahay 0.15-0.30. Saamayn dhab ah waxay u muuqan kartaa mid daciif ah (ama lid ku ah).
somali.observed_r_is_wildly_off_0_30_outliers: r la arkay si weyn ayuu uga leexday (>0.30). Qiimaha shisheeye ama n aad u yar waxay gabi ahaanba rogi karaan jihada muuqata.
somali.correlation_inquiry_when_samples_misle: 🔬 Baadhitaanka xiriirka - Marka muunadaha ay marin habaabiyaan
somali.set_true_population_r_sample_size_nois: Deji r dhabta ah ee dadweynaha, cabbirka muunadda, buuqa, qiimaha shisheeye. Saadaali inta r la arkay uu ka leexanayo. Dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto.
somali.your_hypothesis_which_single_change_mo: Mala-awaalkaaga (isbeddelka keliya ee kee ayaa ugu qalloocinaya r la arkay?)
somali.e_g_2_outliers_at_n_20_do_more_damage_: tusaale, 2 qiime shisheeye oo n=20 ah ayaa dhaawac badan u geysta marka loo eego 10 qiime shisheeye oo n=200 ah...
somali.can_outliers_flip_the_sign_of_r_try_tr: Qiimaha shisheeye ma rogi karaan calaamadda r? Isku day r dhab=+0.7 oo leh 3 qiime shisheeye.
somali.how_does_increasing_n_reduce_the_noisy: Sidee kordhinta n u yareyneysaa xaaladda qiyaaska buuqa leh?
somali.when_does_noise_sd_swamp_the_true_sign: Goorma ayuu SD buuqu si buuxda u qariyaa calaamadda dhabta ah - r sidee buu u muuqdaa markaa?
somali.why_is_r_alone_never_enough_to_publish: Maxay r kaligeed waligeed ugu filneyn daabacaadda? Maxaa kale oo la socon kara (CI, firidhsanaan, hubinta adkaanta)?
somali.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Waxaan sharxi karaa sababta isku-darka n, buuqa, iyo qiimaha shisheeye uu u soo saaro kala duwanaanshahan.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Wijgit baadhitaan - dhibco ma jiraan, daah-furid ma jirto, jawaab-shubid ma jirto. Xogta macmalka ah waxay isticmaashaa abuur go'an oo ka yimaada sliderrada, sidaas darteed booska sliderka isku midka ah had iyo jeer wuxuu soo saaraa soosaarid isku mid ah. Daraasadaha dhabta ah waxay arkaan hal soosaarid waana inay ka fikiraan hubaal la'aanta.
